etymology.description: The word consists of 重(重) (zhòng, "heavy; important") and 要(要) (yào, "want; need; essential").
etymology.interpretation: 重(重) (zhòng, "heavy") conveys importance through the metaphor of weight — something heavy demands attention or care, reflecting its significance. 要(要) (yào, "essential") indicates something crucial or necessary. Together, the combination implies something of significant importance or necessity, something of "weight" and "essence" that demands attention.

examples.chinese: 这件事对我来说非常重要(這件事對我來說非常重要)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì duì wǒ lái shuō fēicháng zhòng yào.
examples.english: This matter is very important to me.

examples.chinese: 了解文化背景是成功的重要因素(了解文化背景是成功的重要因素)。
examples.pinyin: Liǎojiě wénhuà bèijǐng shì chénggōng de zhòng yào yīnsù.
examples.english: Understanding cultural background is an important factor for success.

examples.chinese: 教育在现代社会中扮演着重要角色(教育在現代社會中扮演著重要角色)。
examples.pinyin: Jiàoyù zài xiàndài shèhuì zhōng bànyǎn zhe zhòng yào juésè.
examples.english: Education plays an important role in modern society.
